title: The Fox Without A Tail
content:
Said Fox, minus tail in a trap,
    "My friends! here's a lucky mishap:
    Give your tails a short lease!"
    But the foxes weren't geese,
    And none followed the fashion of trap.

    Yet Some Fashions Have No Better Reason
meaning:
"The Fox Without A Tail" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
